title: Bulk RNA Sequencing of Human Glioma Cell Lines and Normal Human Astrocytes
author: Coombs, Morgan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this study, we performed bulk RNA sequencing of multiple glioma cell lines, including low-grade gliomas, glioblastoma and normal human astrocytes to study the transcriptomic expression of enzymes involved in lipid sythesis pathways.
steps_raw: In this study, we performed bulk RNA sequencing of multiple glioma cell lines, including low-grade gliomas, glioblastoma and normal human astrocytes to study the transcriptomic expression of enzymes involved in lipid sythesis pathways.
